title: Processing frozen cells for population-scale SQK-LSK114 Oxford Nanopore long-read DNA sequencing SOP
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"edamv","text":"At the NIH Center for Alzheimer's and Related Dementias (CARD) (https://card.nih.gov/research-programs/long-read-sequencing), we will generate long-read sequencing data from thousands of patients with Alzheimer's disease, frontotemporal dementia, and Lewy body dementia, as well as healthy subjects. With this research, we will build a public resource consisting of long-read genome sequencing data from a large number of confirmed patients with Alzheimer's disease and related dementias and healthy individuals. To generate this large-scale nanopore sequencing data, we have developed a protocol for processing and long-read sequencing of cultured cells, targeting an N50 of ~25-30 kb and ~30X coverage.   \n","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":64,"length":61}],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":64,"length":59}],"data":{}},{"key":"2r62d","text":"Acknowledgements:\nWe would like to thank the Nanopore team (Jade Bartolo, Olivor Holman, Androo Markham, and Jessica Anderson), PacBio team (Jeffrey Burke, Michelle Kim, Duncan Kilburn, and Kelvin Liu), and the whole CARD long-read team. Workflow graphic by Paige Jarreau.","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":17}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dsgkc","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"errts","text":"†Correspondence to: Kimberley Billingsley billingsleykj@nih.gov","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"UNDERLINE","offset":42,"length":21}],"entityRanges":[{"key":1,"offset":42,"length":21}],"data":{}},{"key":"82mh1","text":"","type":"align-left","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8q7e0","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":2,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"edib7","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"BC6B6DE3323A11EE98500A58A9FEAC02","url":"https://card.nih.gov/research-programs/long-read-sequencing"}},"1":{"type":"link","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"guid":"51ADC28C323B11EE98500A58A9FEAC02","url":null}},"2":{"type":"image","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"align":"","alt":"","guid":"314B323A13B911F08EE70A58A9FEAC02","height":385,"id":563261,"is_video":false,"legend":"{\"blocks\":[{\"key\":\"8ef70\",\"text\":\"Figure 1.
